greeting: Hey there! 👋 I'm PurplePath, your Sheffield Careers guide! I'm here to help you navigate the careers website without the hassle. What can I help you with today?

📄 CV & Cover Letters.greeting: Awesome! Let's get your CV or cover letter sorted. What specifically do you need help with?

CV Writing Guide.response: Great choice! A strong CV can open so many doors. Here are the official Sheffield CV resources — they're packed with tips and examples to help you stand out! 🌟

links.title: CV Writing Guide (Sheffield Careers)
links.description: Step-by-step guidance on writing a professional CV

links.title: CVs, Applications & Interviews Hub
links.description: Full hub covering the entire application process

Get Instant CV Feedback (CareerSet).response: CareerSet is brilliant — it's a FREE AI tool that gives you instant feedback on your CV within seconds! Give it a try before your next application. 🚀

links.title: CareerSet – Instant CV Feedback Tool
links.description: Free AI-powered CV checker for all Sheffield students

Cover Letter Help.response: Cover letters can feel tricky, but don't worry — Sheffield Careers has you covered. Here's where to get help! ✉️

links.title: Cover Letters Guide
links.description: How to write a compelling cover letter

links.title: CareerSet – Cover Letter Feedback
links.description: Instant AI feedback on your cover letter too!

Book a CV Appointment with an Adviser.response: Sometimes you need a real human! Book a 1-to-1 with a Careers Adviser who can give you personalised CV feedback. They're super friendly! 😊

links.title: Career Connect – Book an Appointment
links.description: Book a 1:1 CV appointment with a careers adviser

links.title: Careers Services Overview
links.description: See all available support options

Academic CV / Postgrad Applications.response: Applying for a Masters, PhD or academic post? Academic CVs are a bit different — here's the specific guidance for you! 🎓

links.title: Academic CVs & Postgraduate Applications
links.description: Guidance for masters, PhD and research applications

links.title: Postgraduate Careers Support
links.description: Dedicated support for postgraduate students

🎯 Job Applications & Interviews.greeting: Let's nail those applications and interviews! What part of the process do you need help with?

How to Write a Strong Application.response: From researching employers to submitting your application, here's everything you need to put your best foot forward! 💼

links.title: Applications & Interviews Guide
links.description: Full guide on the job application process

links.title: Using AI in Your Application
links.description: How to use generative AI responsibly in applications

Interview Preparation.response: Interviews can be nerve-wracking but preparation is everything! Sheffield has great resources to help you practise and succeed. You've got this! 💪

links.title: Interview Preparation Guide
links.description: Tips and techniques for job interviews

links.title: Career Connect – Mock Interview Booking
links.description: Book a mock interview with a careers adviser

Online Tests & Assessment Centres.response: Many employers use psychometric tests and assessment centres — here's how to prepare and what to expect! 📊

links.title: Assessment Centres & Online Tests
links.description: Guidance on psychometric tests and assessment centre prep

links.title: Career Connect – Events & Workshops
links.description: Attend mock assessment centre events

Speculative Applications & Networking.response: Not all jobs are advertised! Here's how to approach employers directly and use social media to unlock hidden opportunities. 🌐

links.title: Speculative Applications Guide
links.description: How to contact employers who aren't advertising

links.title: Employers & Networking
links.description: Connect with employers and build your network

Applying with a Disability.response: Sheffield Careers is committed to supporting all students. Here's advice on disclosing a disability and finding supportive employers. ♿

links.title: Disability & Applying for Jobs
links.description: Guidance on disability disclosure and employer research

links.title: The Suit Works – Free Interview Clothing
links.description: Free formal clothing referral for interviews

💼 Placements & Work Experience.greeting: Work experience is a game-changer for your CV! What kind of opportunity are you looking for?

Placement Year.response: A placement year can seriously boost your career prospects — and Sheffield makes it easy to add one to your degree! Here's everything you need to know. 🏢

links.title: Placement Year Guide
links.description: All about adding a placement year to your degree

links.title: Placements & Work Experience Hub
links.description: Full hub for work experience opportunities

Internships.response: Internships are a fantastic way to test a career path! Here's where to find internship opportunities at Sheffield. 🔍

links.title: Internships – Sheffield Careers
links.description: Find and apply for internship opportunities

links.title: Career Connect – Browse Internships
links.description: Search live internship vacancies

Volunteering.response: Volunteering builds amazing skills AND helps your community. Win-win! Here's how to find volunteering opportunities. 🤝

links.title: Volunteering Opportunities
links.description: Find unpaid volunteering and insight day positions

links.title: Students' Union Volunteering
links.description: SU-based volunteering and community projects

Graduate Schemes.response: Graduate schemes are structured programmes offered by big employers — here's what you need to know and how to find them! 🎯

links.title: Graduate Schemes Guide
links.description: Understanding and applying for graduate schemes

links.title: Career Connect – Graduate Opportunities
links.description: Browse live graduate scheme vacancies

Virtual Work Experience.response: Can't commit to a full placement? Virtual work experience is flexible and still looks great on your CV! 💻

links.title: Virtual Work Experience
links.description: Flexible virtual experience opportunities

links.title: Placements Hub – All Options
links.description: Explore all types of work experience

💰 Part-Time Work.greeting: Looking to earn while you study? Great idea! What kind of part-time work are you interested in?

Find Part-Time Jobs.response: Thousands of part-time jobs are posted on Career Connect every year! Here's where to search for jobs that fit around your studies. 🔎

links.title: Career Connect – Part-Time Jobs
links.description: Search and apply for part-time jobs near you

links.title: Part-Time Work During Studies Guide
links.description: Advice on balancing work and study

Part-Time Jobs Fair.response: Sheffield hosts a Part-Time Jobs Fair in autumn — meet local employers and find flexible work! Keep an eye on Career Connect for dates. 📅

links.title: Careers Events & Fairs
links.description: Upcoming careers fairs and events including jobs fairs

links.title: Employability Hubs on Campus
links.description: Drop in for help with part-time job queries

On-Campus Jobs (University).response: The University and SU offer loads of student staff roles that pay at least the Real Living Wage. Check them out! 🏫

links.title: University Jobs Portal
links.description: Student roles within the University of Sheffield

links.description: Student Union job and employability support

🎓 Graduate Careers.greeting: Thinking about life after graduation? Let's explore your options! What are you interested in?

Finding Graduate Jobs.response: Whether you're after a graduate scheme or a direct-entry role, Sheffield Careers can help you land your first job! Here's where to start. 🚀

links.title: Finding Graduate Jobs Guide
links.description: How and where to find the right graduate role

links.description: Live graduate job listings updated daily

International Job Markets.response: Fancy working abroad? Sheffield's GoinGlobal database covers career guides and job boards for countries worldwide! 🌍

links.description: Country-specific career guides and international job boards

Career Planning & Exploring Options.response: Not sure what you want to do? That's completely normal! The careers team are brilliant at helping you figure things out. 🧭

links.title: Student & Graduate Support Hub
links.description: Explore all your career options and pathways

links.title: Book a Careers Appointment
links.description: 1:1 session to explore your career options

Graduate Access (3 Years Post-Graduation.response: Did you know Sheffield Careers supports you for up to 3 years after you graduate? You're never alone in your job search! 🌟

links.description: Set up your graduate account to maintain access

links.description: Continued support after graduation

📚 Further Study.greeting: Thinking about continuing your studies? Let's find the right information for you!

Masters Degrees.response: A Masters can open new doors and deepen your expertise. Here's how Sheffield Careers can help you with your postgraduate journey! 🎓

links.title: Postgraduate Careers Support
links.description: Month-by-month careers calendar for masters students

links.description: Guidance on choosing the right further study path

PhD & Research Careers.response: A PhD is an exciting journey — and Sheffield Careers is here to support you through it and beyond! 🔬

links.title: PhD & Research Career Guidance
links.description: Support for PhD students and academic career planning

Professional Qualifications.response: Looking to add a professional qualification to your skillset? Great idea! Here's how to explore your options. 📋

🛠️ Careers Services & Support.greeting: I'm here to point you to the right support! What kind of service are you looking for?

Book a 1:1 Careers Appointment.response: A 1-to-1 with a Careers Adviser is one of the most valuable things you can do! They're friendly, non-judgemental and super helpful. 😊

links.title: Career Connect – Book Appointment
links.description: Book online appointments with expert advisers

links.title: Careers Services Overview
links.description: All the ways the careers team can support you

Drop-in at Campus Hubs.response: Need quick help? Drop into one of the campus hubs — no appointment needed for initial queries! The staff and student ambassadors are brilliant. 📍

links.title: Employability Hubs on Campus
links.description: Hub locations, opening hours, and what they offer

Careers Events & Workshops.response: Sheffield runs loads of events throughout the year — workshops, employer talks, career fairs, and more. Don't miss out! 📅

links.title: Career Connect – Events & Workshops
links.description: Browse and register for upcoming careers events

links.title: Careers Fairs & Employer Events
links.description: Sheffield's biggest careers fairs in the region

mySkills – Skills Tracker.response: mySkills helps you reflect on and record all the skills you build during your time at Sheffield — useful for CVs and interviews! 💡

links.title: mySkills Platform
links.description: Record and reflect on your skills development

links.title: Sheffield Graduate Attributes
links.description: Learn about the skills Sheffield helps you develop

Sheffield Alumni & Mentoring (SUMS).response: The Sheffield University Mentoring Service connects you with alumni mentors who've been in your shoes. Genuinely invaluable! 🤝

links.title: Alumni Mentoring Platform (SUMS)
links.description: Exclusive mentoring platform for students and alumni

links.title: Employers & Networking Guide

Free Interview Clothing (The Suit Works).response: Don't let clothes be a barrier to your success! Sheffield Careers can refer you to The Suit Works for FREE formal interview clothing. 👔

links.title: The Suit Works Referral
links.description: Get a free referral for formal interview clothing

🌍 Skills & Development.greeting: Investing in your skills is always worth it! What would you like to develop?

Skills & Personal Development.response: Sheffield gives you so many opportunities to build skills inside and outside the classroom. Here's how to make the most of them! 💪

LinkedIn & Online Presence.response: LinkedIn is essential for your career journey! Sheffield Careers offers LinkedIn Booster sessions to help you create a standout profile. 🔗

Entrepreneurship & Starting a Business.response: Thinking about starting your own venture? Sheffield has amazing support for student entrepreneurs! 💡

fallback_message: I'm not sure about that one, but the Sheffield Careers team will definitely know! You can reach them through Career Connect or drop into one of the campus hubs.
